description_long: This bungalow features a low-pitched, hipped roof with brown asphalt shingles and a prominent brick chimney. The front facade is characterized by a central glass door flanked by large rectangular windows, framed with alternating brick and dark trim. The exterior walls combine red brickwork with horizontal dark bands, giving a modern yet classic suburban appearance. The windows are large and symmetrically placed on the front and side, allowing ample natural light inside. The rear and one side of the building are mostly solid, with minimal window openings, emphasizing privacy. The structure sits low to the ground, typical of single-story residential bungalows found in urban neighborhoods.
description: A single-story brick bungalow with a hipped shingle roof, large front windows, and a central glass door, featuring a prominent brick chimney and modern trim.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central glass door, two large windows, and alternating brick and dark trim details.
description_view_1: Side view with a mostly solid wall, a small window, and the chimney visible on the roof.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain wall, no visible windows or doors, and the chimney on the left side of the roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a large window and partial view of the front entryway, plus the chimney at the roof's rear.
